opportunity.title: I wrote a open source iMessage for your AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The complexity of reliably routing to external APIs like iMessage often gets underestimated; you'll quickly encounter rate limiting, authentication drift, and evolving data formats that necessitate constant maintenance. Consider a layered abstraction – a "capability" interface – to insulate your agents from the specifics of each provider, enabling easier swapping and resilience. It’s a pain point we’ve addressed repeatedly in our architecture.
actions.reasoning: My work involves routing LLM requests and building agent infrastructure, so I have direct experience with the challenges of integrating external services.
